---
title: "Drone - Willow - Bumblebee"
lightbox: true
---

This is a website test for the upcoming fieldtrip and projects site.
 
:::{.column-page}
![The Jakobshavn Glacier modelled in PISM. Ignore this. Will put something relevant here.](./media/pism.png)
:::

  

 
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| column: screen-inset-shaded

library(leaflet)
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%  # Add default OpenStreetMap map tiles 
  addMarkers(lng=7.5244779006725375, lat=60.59364220037374, popup="The location of Hoth")
```
